Schedule appointments with verified doctors. Instant consultations. Video or in-person. All specialties.

Appointments

Meet Our Doctors

Dr. Sarah Johnson

Cardiology

4.9 (450 reviews)

20+ years experience. Board certified. Specializes in heart disease treatment.

Dr. Michael Chen

Neurology

4.8 (380 reviews)

18+ years experience. Neurological disorders. Brain health expert.

15+ years experience. Skin care expert. Cosmetic dermatology.

How It Works

1

Search & Find

Browse thousands of verified doctors. Filter by specialty, location, and availability.

2

Book Appointment

Select your preferred date and time. Get instant confirmation.

3

Video Consultation

Join video call or visit in-person. Get professional medical advice.

4

Get Prescription

Receive digital prescriptions. Order medicines online.

Questions?

Yes, all doctors are verified and licensed. We perform background checks and verify credentials.
Consultation fees vary by doctor (₹300-1500). Prices shown before booking.
Yes, 100% secure. All data encrypted. HIPAA compliant. No information shared.

Your Health, Our Priority

Book with top-rated doctors today
